title: TJ Roadworthy: total upgrade under new ownership
description: BUSINESS NEWS - TJ Roadworthy Centre in...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - TJ Roadworthy Centre in George is proud to announce a new chapter in its storied history. Under the brand-new leadership of experienced new partner Chris Horne and his team, TJ's is set to redefine the standards for the roadworthiness of light and heavy vehicles in the region.


> Horne and his team bring a wealth of experience from their well-known and trusted establishments in Pretoria, Menlyn Roadworthy and Silver Lakes Roadworthy.


Menlyn Roadworthy has been a cornerstone in the community for about 27 years, earning a reputation for reliability and excellence. With this proven track record, Horne is excited to bring the same level of commitment and quality to George.

TJ's has been serving the George community for about 19 years, and with the recent change in ownership at the beginning of June, the centre has undergone a complete revamp. The premises have been upgraded and modernised, creating a welcoming and efficient environment. Additionally, they have appointed more dedicated and highly qualified examiners to ensure the highest standards of service.

"We want to give TJ's a new look and image," says Horne. "We've done a lot here already, and we have very capable people working here. We want the community to know that we are here to give them the best service. Our children, our parents, our friends are on the roads daily. Our biggest priority is safe and roadworthy vehicles on the road."

At TJ's, the commitment to road safety is paramount. The centre's mission is to ensure that every vehicle that leaves the premises is thoroughly inspected and meets the stringent safety standards required for roadworthiness. This dedication to safety and quality service is what sets TJ's apart under its new ownership.New features at TJ Roadworthy Centre

- Revamped premises: A complete upgrade of the facilities to provide a modern and efficient service environment.
- Experienced team: More highly qualified and experienced examiners have been employed to ensure top-notch service.
- Community focus: A commitment to the safety of all road users, prioritising the well-being of the community.
- Enhanced services: Continued dedication to providing the best roadworthy inspections and services in George.

TJ Roadworthy Centre invites all old and new clients to experience the difference under its new ownership. Horne and his team are eager to welcome you to their revamped and upgraded premises, ensuring that every vehicle on the road is safe and roadworthy.

For more information please visit them in Laing Street, George Industrial (look for the signs), or give them a call on 044 874 7057.

Trading hoursMonday to Friday: 07:30 to 16:30Saturdays: 08:00 to 12:00

Look for the new signage in Laing Street

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
